title: Smoky Stir Fry
description: A flavorful and easy stir fry dish made with smoky sausage and broccoli. Serve hot over rice or noodles.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced sausage and cook until browned, about 3-4 minutes.
Remove the sausage from the skillet and set aside.
Add the remaining 1 tablespoon of olive oil to the skillet.
Add the broccoli and cook until tender, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the garlic and ginger to the skillet and cook for 1 minute.
Add the stir fry sauce, brown sugar, and soy sauce to the skillet and stir to combine.
Return the sausage to the skillet and stir to combine.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, until the sauce has thickened.
Serve hot over rice or noodles.
